channel.title: Hubs on Alans Digital Twin Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hubs on Alans Digital Twin Blog

item.title: AI 應用工程
item.description:
🤖 AI 應用工程知識樞紐

從「提示詞工程 (Prompting)」跨越到「系統工程 (Systems Engineering)」。本樞紐聚焦於構建可靠、可擴展且自主的 AI Agent 所需的底層架構。

🧠 提示詞與上下文層

核心目標：縮小搜索空間並最大化 LLM 的推理能力。

  • 模式：[[articles/ai-engineering/prompt-patterns|結構化提示詞模式]]
  • 記憶：[[articles/ai-engineering/context-window-dynamics|上下文窗口動態與 Token 經濟學]]

🔍 檢索與知識 (RAG)

核心目標：將「語義搜索」轉化為「知識合成」。

  • 真相：[[articles/ai-engineering/rag-truth|為什麼向量搜索會失敗]]
  • 深潛：[[articles/ai-engineering/rag-deep-dive-chunking-embedding|分塊與嵌入策略深潛]]
  • 進階：[[articles/ai-engineering/graphrag-deep-dive|GraphRAG 與全局合成]] → [[articles/ai-engineering/long-context-vs-rag|長上下文 vs RAG]]

⚙️ 代理工作流與 LLMOps

核心目標：構建自主循環與生產級的安全護欄。

  • 工作流：[[articles/ai-engineering/agentic-workflows|代理工作流模式]]
  • 評估：[[articles/ai-engineering/llm-evaluation-framework|將「感覺 (Vibes)」轉化為工程實踐]]
  • 基礎設施：[[articles/ai-engineering/llmops-infrastructure|生產級 LLMOps 基礎設施]]

下一步 → 若想在自有硬件上部署這些 Agent，請訪問 [[hubs/homelab|HomeLab 樞紐]]。

item.title: Homelab
item.description:
🏠 HomeLab Deep Dive Hub

Where SRE meets the home. This hub is about building “Sovereign Infrastructure” — having total control over your compute, storage, and AI.

💾 Storage Mastery

Focus: Data durability and the fight against Bit Rot.

  • ZFS: [[articles/homelab/nas-zfs-integrity|NAS ZFS & Data Integrity]]
  • Architecture: [[articles/homelab/nas-vs-das|NAS vs DAS: Choosing your Pipe]]

🖥️ Hypervisor & Compute

Focus: Virtualization at scale on consumer hardware.

  • Proxmox: [[articles/homelab/proxmox-deep-dive|Proxmox VE Deep Dive]]
  • GPU: [[articles/homelab/local-ai-infra|Local AI Infra: GPU Passthrough]]

📦 App Ecosystem

Focus: Moving from “managing files” to “managing services.”

item.title: Sre_Infra
item.description:
🛠️ SRE & Infrastructure Hub

Welcome to the SRE Knowledge Map. Here, we dive deep into the Linux kernel, networking stacks, and the art of building stable, high-performance systems.

🚀 Performance & Kernel

Focus: Squeezing every drop of performance from the hardware.

  • CPU & Memory: [[articles/performance/cpu-numa|CPU Topology & NUMA Penalties]] → [[articles/performance/cfs-scheduler|CFS Scheduler Deep Dive]]
  • I/O Path: [[articles/performance/vfs-tracing|VFS & Page Cache Tracing]] → [[articles/performance/psi-metrics|PSI Pressure Metrics]]
  • Network Stack: [[articles/tcp-stack-deep-dive|TCP Stack Internals]] → [[articles/network-tuning-deep-dive|Network Tuning Guide]]
  • Observability: [[articles/ebpf-modern-observability|eBPF Modern Observability]]

📦 Container & Orchestration

Focus: The plumbing of modern cloud-native environments.
